name: Germany 10-Year Bund Yield
notes: Bundesbank BBSIS — daily yield on outstanding domestic bearer debt securities residual maturity over 9 to 10 years (Umlaufsrendite). Ultimate source for the same canonical column FRED carries monthly (IRLTLT01DEM156N); shares DEU_BUND_10Y so the daily direct series wins on freshness with FRED as automatic fallback. Verified live 2026-05-28 (3.12%). SDMX-ML only.

name: Germany Government Bond Yield (1-2y residual maturity)
notes: Bundesbank BBSIS — yield on outstanding domestic bearer debt securities residual maturity over 1 to 2 years. Short end of the German curve; genuine coverage gap (no aggregator equivalent). Verified live 2026-05-28 (2.68%).

name: Germany HICP Annual Inflation Rate
notes: Bundesbank BBDP1 — Harmonised Index of Consumer Prices Germany all-items YoY %-change. Harmonised (HICP) measure; genuine gap (FRED/WB carry the national CPI not the Bundesbank HICP). Verified live 2026-05-28 (2.9% @ 2026-04).

name: Germany HICP Index (All Items)
notes: Bundesbank BBDP1 — Harmonised Index of Consumer Prices Germany all-items index. Companion level to DEU_HICP_YOY. Rebased by Eurostat to 2025=100 in early 2026 (was 2015=100); units relabelled 2026-06-17 after live BBK_UNIT read '2025=100'. Verified live 2026-06-17 (102.55 @ 2026-05).
